# Gold Coast Window and Pressure Cleaning

> Professional exterior cleaning services on the Gold Coast and Northern NSW, Australia.

## About
Gold Coast Window and Pressure Cleaning is a locally owned and operated exterior cleaning company serving all Gold Coast suburbs and Northern NSW (Tweed region). Fully insured with police-checked staff.

## Services
- Window Cleaning (interior and exterior, up to 4 stories)
- Roof Cleaning (manufacturer-recommended process)
- Pressure Cleaning (driveways, paths, patios, pool areas)
- House & Building Softwash (gentle mould and grime removal)
- Gutter Cleaning (includes downpipe checks)
- Solar Panel Cleaning (warranty-safe methods)
- Solar Panel Bird Proofing (marine-grade mesh installation)

## Commercial & Strata
We service commercial buildings, strata complexes, and body corporate properties. $20M public liability, SWMS supplied, after-hours scheduling available.

## Service Area
All Gold Coast suburbs from Coolangatta to Ormeau, plus Gold Coast Hinterland and Northern NSW (Tweed Heads, Kingscliff, and surrounding areas). 81 suburbs covered.

## Contact
- Phone: (07) 5651 2386

## Hours
Open 24 hours, 7 days a week

## Ratings
5.0 stars on Google with 2,500+ reviews
